package rulefixtures

import (
	"database/sql"
)

// scenario for tx_without_rollback_guard: Transactions begun and later committed with no observed rollback guard.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario402Positive(db *sql.DB) error {
	tx, err := db.Begin()
	if err != nil { return err }
	if _, err := tx.Exec("update jobs set done = true"); err != nil { return err }
	return tx.Commit()
}
